name: Barbecued Corned Beef & Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients (except the 1/3 cup canned corned beef) into the pan in the order listed.
2. Select white bread and push "Start."
3. Add the chopped corned beef at the beep, which is 88 minutes into the cycle (33 minutes with DAK Turbo II).
4. This bread should be stored in the refrigerator or freezer.
5. The recipe creates a bread reminiscent of the 1950s open-faced sandwich favorite made by covering split hamburger buns with canned corned beef, cheese slices, and a dollop of barbecue sauce, then heating them in the oven.
